title: Manage a Busy Inbox
drDigitalIntro:
Your inbox is full — time to clean it up!
• Spot the scam and get rid of it.
• Reply to an email, compose a new one with CC and an attachment.
• Archive what you don't need anymore.
• You know how to do all of this — let's go!

playgroundTask.goal: You cleaned up a messy inbox like a pro

steps.say: That email from URGENT WIN looks suspicious. Open it to check.
Definitely a scam. Mark it as spam.
Go to the Spam folder to confirm it landed there.
Good — the scam is in Spam where it belongs. Go back to your Inbox.
Mom asked about dinner. Open her email.
Reply to Mom and say you'll be there.
steps.value: Yes, Sunday works! See you at 6.

steps.say: Now compose a new email — click the compose button.
Address it to your friend Jordan.
CC your friend Alex so they're in the loop.
Write: 'Hey! Want to get together this weekend? I attached the schedule.'
steps.value: Hey! Want to get together this weekend? I attached the schedule.

steps.say: Attach a file to the email.
The Amazon shipping email is done — archive it to keep your inbox clean.

drDigitalSuccess: Inbox zero! You spotted the scam, replied to Mom, composed a professional email with CC and an attachment, and archived what you didn't need.
drDigitalHint: Use the folder sidebar to navigate, the compose button to write new emails, and the action buttons when viewing an email.
